ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, PLAINTIFF JOSEPH MCNERNEY'S MOTION TO TAX DEFENDANT HENNESSY INDUSTRIES, INC.'S MEMORANDUM OF COSTS. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Defendant Hennessy Industries, Inc.S Memorandum Of Costs
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Richard M. Grant, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff
/ moving party Joseph McNerney
Linda L. Nusser, Esq. of GORDON & REES (415-986-5900), appearing for defendant / opposing party Hennessy Industries, Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFF JOSEPH MCNERNEY'S Motion To Tax Defendant Hennessy Industries, Inc.'s Memorandum Of Costs
Argued and tentative ruling adopted as modified: Plaintiff's motion to tax defendant Hennessy Industries' memorandum of costs is granted as to Berry and Berry costs and denied as to RecordTrak costs. Defendant withdrew its request for Berry and Berry costs. The RecordTrak costs are recoverable as deposition costs and/or in the court's discretion because they were reasonably necessary. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
